sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110214" key="fallofore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φαλλοφορ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n110214.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φαλληφορέω</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1598.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philomnest.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
